name: Puff Dragon
description:
This cute and unassuming dragon toy activates once a creature moves into its square. It then unleashes a rapid burst of toxic gas in a 10-foot emanation. Those within the emanation when the snare is activated must attempt a DC 25 Fortitude check saving throw or take 3d6 poison damage.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is Sickened 1.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is Sickened 2.
